actualKeyboardRoute: start slope -> zones 01-04 -> active boulder chase in destruction maze -> physical giant curve -> three jump-dash gaps under chase -> pass 08 exit
limitations: Only zones 01 through 06 have playable collision in pass 08.
The remaining four zones are still blueprint data.
The active chase currently ends at the temporary Pass 08 exit; the bridge finale is not implemented.
Destroyed supports and floors use graybox debris, not final destruction animation.
Graybox shapes are collision prototypes, not final terrain art.
